title: Entrance Hall
description: You stand in the grand entrance hall of the Conjuring house. Shadows dance on the walls, and a cold breeze whispers your name.

consequence.text: You step into the sacred space, feeling a presence watching you.
The stairs creak under your feet. You hear distant screams.

title: Chapel
description: The chapel is dimly lit by flickering candles. A cross hangs on the wall, but it seems to move when you're not looking.

consequence.text: You feel a momentary peace, but then the candles extinguish.
You find a confessional key.

title: Basement
description: The basement is damp and cold. Chains hang from the ceiling, and you see strange symbols on the walls.

consequence.text: The symbols glow faintly. You record them as evidence.
You escape, but the door slams shut behind you.

title: Attic
description: The attic is filled with old trunks and cobwebs. A rocking chair moves on its own.

consequence.text: You find an old camera.
The chair rocks violently. You see a ghost.

title: Confessional Room
description: You enter the confessional. Whispers echo from the other side.

consequence.text: You capture EVP recordings.
You find a hidden tunnel.

title: Ritual Room
description: A room with a pentagram on the floor. Candles burn low.

consequence.text: The room darkens. You find a cursed relic.
You back away slowly.

title: Hidden Tunnel
description: A narrow tunnel leads deeper into the house.

consequence.text: You emerge in the library.
You return to the confessional.

title: Library
description: Bookshelves tower above you. Some books are chained.

consequence.text: The text drives you mad.
You find a map to the final chamber.

title: Bedroom Corridor
description: A long corridor with doors to bedrooms. Footsteps echo.

consequence.text: You see a figure in the mirror.
You reach the final chamber.

title: Final Chamber
description: You reach the heart of the house. The entity awaits.

consequence.text: You survived the night!
The entity recoils. You escape with evidence.
